testcase.name: test_register_loader_class_and_async_load_flow
testcase.system-out: --------------------------------- Captured Log --------------------------------- WARNING data_manager:data_manager.py:459 统一基础设施集成层不可用，使用标准logging WARNING data_manager:data_manager.py:495 使用降级基础设施服务 WARNING data_manager:data_manager.py:516 降级缓存初始化失败: No module named 'src.data.core.cache' INFO data_registry:registry.py:36 DataRegistry initialized INFO disk_cache:disk_cache.py:76 DiskCache initialized with cache_dir: cache INFO data_manager:data_manager.py:245 使用降级缓存管理器 WARNING data_manager:data_manager.py:847 StockDataLoader not available WARNING data_manager:data_manager.py:853 IndexDataLoader not available WARNING data_manager:data_manager.py:860 NewsDataLoader not available WARNING data_manager:data_manager.py:867 FinancialDataLoader not available INFO data_manager:data_manager.py:578 核心服务注册完成 INFO data_manager:data_manager.py:269 DataManager initialized successfully INFO data_registry:registry.py:70 Registered loader class: stock INFO data_registry:registry.py:104 Created and registered loader instance: stock WARNING data_manager:data_manager.py:931 Quality monitoring failed: 'DataQualityMonitor' object has no attribute 'track_metrics' ERROR disk_cache:disk_cache.py:76 Error saving to disk for key stock_2020-01-01_2020-01-31_1d_symbols_AAA: Can't pickle local object 'DummyLoader.load.<locals>.SpyModel' INFO data_manager:data_manager.py:955 Data loaded successfully: stock --------------------------------- Captured Out ---------------------------------
